scripts.build: npm run wasm:build && tsc --noEmit && vite build
scripts.build:release: npm run wasm:build:release && tsc --noEmit && vite build
scripts.benchmark:smoke: npm run wasm:build && npm run benchmark:smoke:run -- --wasm-profile dev
scripts.benchmark:smoke:release: npm run wasm:build:release && npm run benchmark:smoke:run -- --wasm-profile release
scripts.benchmark:full: npm run wasm:build && npm run benchmark:smoke:run -- --full --no-thresholds --wasm-profile dev
scripts.benchmark:full:release: npm run wasm:build:release && npm run benchmark:smoke:run -- --full --no-thresholds --wasm-profile release
scripts.benchmark:compare: npm run wasm:build && npm run benchmark:compare:run -- --wasm-profile dev
scripts.benchmark:compare:release: npm run wasm:build:release && npm run benchmark:compare:run -- --wasm-profile release
